channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-22
item.description: The geopolitical landscape remains tense with significant developments in Ukraine, Iran, and Africa, while economic pressures affect global airlines.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-22
item.description: Amazon faces renewed scrutiny over workplace safety, while the White House nears a $500 million deal to support Spirit Airlines amid rising operational costs.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-22
item.description: Elon Musk announced that millions of Tesla vehicles will not receive unsupervised Full Self-Driving capabilities, while OpenAI introduced custom bots for business tasks.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-22
item.description: The NFL draft approaches with significant trade buzz, while the Mets continue their losing streak, now at 12 games.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-22
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include new species of pit vipers, unexpected findings from the James Webb Space Telescope, and breakthroughs in material science and ancient DNA analysis.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-21
item.description: US President Trump has delayed escalation in the Iran conflict while various global issues, including domestic worker rights in Indonesia and Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws, are in focus.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-21
item.description: Kevin Warsh's nomination as Fed chair faces scrutiny amid political tensions, while Apple prepares for leadership change and gig-work apps push for healthcare deregulation.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-21
item.description: SpaceX is considering a $60 billion acquisition of Cursor, while AI backlash grows ahead of upcoming elections and OpenAI enhances its image generator capabilities.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-21
item.description: Victor Wembanyama's concussion raises concerns for the Spurs as they face playoff challenges, while the Mets extend their losing streak to 12 games.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-21
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include a new state of matter in distant planets, advanced imaging techniques, and breakthroughs in environmental and health applications.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-20
item.description: Tensions rise in the Middle East as the US maintains its blockade on Iran, while global incidents prompt security concerns in various regions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-20
item.description: Tim Cook will step down as Apple CEO, with John Ternus set to take over in September, amid rising oil prices and ongoing economic concerns.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-20
item.description: Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple CEO, with John Ternus set to take over in September, while Dyson launches a new travel-size hairdryer.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-20
item.description: The NBA playoffs continue with notable performances, while MLB faces injury setbacks and a significant rule controversy.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-20
item.description: Recent scientific advancements include a new termite control method, breakthroughs in dolomite growth, and innovative solutions for microplastic removal from water.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-19
item.description: A mass shooting in Louisiana claimed the lives of seven children, while global tensions rise over oil prices and geopolitical conflicts.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-19
item.description: Uber and Lyft drivers are struggling with soaring fuel prices, while gas prices in the US may not drop below $3 until 2027, according to experts.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-19
item.description: Blue Origin successfully reused its New Glenn rocket, while Vercel faced a significant data breach amid ongoing concerns about a global RAM shortage.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-19
item.description: The Magic and Sabres achieved significant playoff victories, while the Mets extended their losing streak to 11 games, marking their longest since 2004.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-19
item.description: Recent scientific advancements include a dirt-powered fuel cell, artificial neurons communicating with brain cells, and insights into antibiotic resistance and black hole jets.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-18
item.description: Iran blames a US blockade for the closure of the Strait of Hormuz amid rising tensions, while a gunman in Kyiv has killed at least six people.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-18
item.description: Traders are making significant bets on geopolitical events, while central banks prepare for potential financial crises amid rising oil prices and unionization efforts in major companies.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-18
item.description: The ongoing RAM shortage is expected to persist for several years, potentially lasting until 2030, impacting various technology sectors.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-18
item.description: The NBA playoffs kicked off with notable wins for the Nuggets and Lakers, while the Mets continue to struggle with a ten-game losing streak.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-18
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from the effects of caffeine on ants to breakthroughs in artificial neurons and the implications of oceanic methane emissions for climate change.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-17
item.description: Oil prices fell significantly after Iran announced the Strait of Hormuz is open for commercial shipping during the ceasefire.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-17
item.description: Oil prices fell below $90 a barrel as Iran reopened the strait of Hormuz, while Starbucks employees at the first store seek to unionize amid contract disputes.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-17
item.description: OpenAI's leadership changes and new AI applications highlight ongoing shifts in the technology landscape, including ethical concerns and innovative gadgets.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-17
item.description: The Orlando Magic advanced in the playoffs, while Will Anderson Jr. secured a record contract with the Texans and Oscar Schmidt passed away at 68.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-17
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries highlight significant advancements in understanding antibiotic resistance, ozone recovery challenges, and potential alien life detection methods.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-16
item.description: Pope Francis criticizes global leaders and foreign exploitation while various international incidents, including violence and crime, dominate headlines.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-16
item.description: Senate Democrats are attempting to delay the confirmation of Trump's nominee for Federal Reserve chair amid ongoing tensions surrounding military spending and economic stability.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-16
item.description: YouTube introduces timestamp sharing on mobile, while Netflix updates its app for vertical video and cofounder Reed Hastings announces his departure.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-16
item.description: As the NFL draft approaches, teams are focusing on key prospects while Connor McDavid secures another scoring title and Napheesa Collier signs a supermax deal.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-16
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries highlight both challenges and breakthroughs in understanding climate change, ancient species, and viral infections.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-15
item.description: Diplomatic efforts to prevent war in Iran intensify amid ongoing violence in the region and political tensions in the US.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-15
item.description: Wall Street reached a record high amid optimism about the end of the Iran war, while Trump faces scrutiny over military spending and potential trade deal changes.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-15
item.description: YouTube introduces a feature to disable Shorts, while Ford's EV chief departs and Ticketmaster is found to be an illegal monopoly.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-15
item.description: The NBA play-in games concluded with the Warriors and 76ers advancing, while MLB celebrates Jackie Robinson's legacy amid executive changes in the Players Association.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-15
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from ancient fossils to breakthroughs in understanding productivity and potential alien life detection methods.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-14
item.description: US Treasury Secretary supports economic pain for long-term security against Iran, while Israel and Lebanon initiate direct talks for the first time in decades.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-14
item.description: The IMF warns that escalating tensions in Iran could lead to a global recession, significantly impacting the UK economy.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-14
item.description: Microsoft is discontinuing its Surface Hub touchscreen displays, while privacy advocates are urging Google to stop sharing consumer data with ICE.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-14
item.description: LaMelo Ball's clutch performance led the Hornets to victory over the Heat in a dramatic play-in game, while the Blazers secured the 7th seed in the playoffs.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-14
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include a rare cosmic reaction, debunking myths about Hawaiian birds, and advancements in understanding metabolism and quantum systems.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-13
item.description: Lebanon engages in peace talks with Israel amid limited influence, while global political tensions rise with Hungary's PM's comments on Russia and Italy's PM condemning Trump.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-13
item.description: Oil prices fell below $100 a barrel amid mixed signals from US-Iran negotiations and concerns over energy market stability.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-13
item.description: Daniel Moreno-Gama faces federal charges for attacking OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while Microsoft raises Surface device prices amid RAM shortages.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-13
item.description: The 2026 WNBA draft saw Azzi Fudd selected first overall, while UCLA set a record with five first-round picks.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-13
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries highlight advancements in health, environmental challenges, and new insights into human history and genetics.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-12
item.description: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule in Hungary ends with a significant election defeat, while global tensions rise over U.S. plans to blockade Iranian ports.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-12
item.description: The collapse of US-Iran talks raises concerns over rising energy prices, while Texas seeks to attract investment with a new London office.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-12
item.description: Rockstar Games confirmed a data breach with no expected impact, while the Netherlands became the first European country to approve Tesla's Full Self-Driving technology.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-12
item.description: Rory McIlroy won his second consecutive Masters title, while Doc Rivers is leaving the Bucks and the NBA playoffs are set to begin.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-12
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into human history, health, and the universe, including Neanderthal interactions and advancements in cancer treatment.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-11
item.description: Hungarians are voting on whether to end Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule amid ongoing tensions in Ukraine and rising political challenges in Europe.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-11
item.description: US inflation rises sharply amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, impacting various sectors including airlines and government employment.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-11
item.description: The Netherlands becomes the first European country to approve Tesla's supervised Full Self-Driving technology, potentially influencing wider EU adoption.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-11
item.description: Rory McIlroy's dramatic Saturday at the Masters sets up a competitive final round, while UFC and NCAA hockey also saw significant developments.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-11
item.description: Recent studies reveal new insights into nutrition, cancer treatment, Alzheimer’s detection, and dark matter, highlighting significant advancements in various scientific fields.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-10
item.description: Historic US-Iran talks are set to occur amid rising tensions in the Middle East and political shifts in Hungary and Lebanon.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-10
item.description: US inflation rises sharply amid economic uncertainty from the Iran conflict, while concerns over cyber risks from AI models prompt meetings with bank executives.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-10
item.description: The FAA is exploring unconventional solutions to its air traffic controller shortage, while Amazon Luna is discontinuing third-party game purchases.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-10
item.description: Rory McIlroy leads the Masters by six shots, while the Celtics tie an NBA record for three-pointers made in a game.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-10
item.description: Recent scientific advancements include a nutrient that may enhance cancer treatment, a new stool test for colorectal cancer, and insights into Alzheimer's treatment strategies.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-09
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East continue as ceasefire discussions unfold, while global political dynamics shift with new regulations and international incidents.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-09
item.description: The ongoing Iran conflict is significantly impacting global oil prices and economic forecasts, with potential long-term effects on the economy.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-09
item.description: OpenAI introduces a new $100 per month Pro subscription for ChatGPT, while Florida investigates the company over potential national security risks.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-09
item.description: Rory McIlroy co-leads the Masters after a strong opening round, while NBA star Joel Embiid undergoes surgery for appendicitis.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-09
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into health, genetics, and human history, including new anti-inflammatory compounds and the role of gut bacteria in neurodegenerative diseases.
